message:
feat: add Group renderable and Text::join method

- Add Group renderable for combining multiple renderables into a single unit
  (bd-3oe0). Group implements Renderable trait and allows passing multiple
  items to Panel/Layout. Includes push(), push_boxed(), fit() methods.

- Add impl<T: Renderable + ?Sized> Renderable for &T to support reference types

- Add Text::join() method for joining Text objects with separator (bd-2rzd)

Tests: 5 group tests + 4 join tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
